entity.summary: Somnia-native decentralized exchange combining central-limit-order-book precision with automated-market-maker flexibility, self-custodial trading, programmable smart offers, swaps, and liquidity strategies.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Elix as a CLOB/AMM hybrid decentralized exchange on Somnia and documents swaps, trading, earning, programmable offers, hooks, and deployment resources. The live application endpoint is reachable.

evidence.title: Elix Overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Elix as a CLOB/AMM hybrid DEX on Somnia and documents self-custodial trading, smart offers, swaps, trade, earn, hooks, audits, and deployment resources.

evidence.title: Elix.fi official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party Elix.fi domain remains reachable and routes users into the current product surface.

evidence.title: Elix.fi application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Elix application endpoint is reachable and serves the live DEX application surface.
